description_long: This is an adult woman depicted in a traditional South Asian sari, featuring a draped garment that covers her body and is paired with a short-sleeved blouse. She is adorned with simple jewelry, including bangles on both wrists. Her feet are bare, and her posture is upright with arms slightly extended to the sides. The sari is wrapped over her left shoulder and falls to her ankles, with the pallu (loose end) hanging down her back. Her hair is styled in a neat, low bun, and her facial features are calm and neutral.
description: An adult woman in a traditional sari with bangles, bare feet, and hair in a low bun, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full sari drape, blouse, facial features, and both arms with bangles.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the sari drape, arm, and the bun hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blouse, the pallu of the sari, and the bun hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the sari, arm, and the bun hairstyle.
attribute_clothing_type: traditional sari with short-sleeved blouse and bangles
attribute_hairstyle: short hair styled in a low bun
